Layout.name: FAT Media

StyledText.Data: All media in Title <<FAT Title::Reference title>> with localisation code <<$$localisation_code>>

Calculation.Text: "View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"
"Type three letters or more to search for media filename"

StyledText.Data: Number of media containers: <<Num of media records>>
View only media included in package

Calculation.Text: FAT Media::Container file extension = "svg" Or Not SubtitleMedia ( FAT Media::Container file extension ) And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "json"
Case ( FAT Media::Container file extension = "svg" ; "data:image/xml+svg;charset=utf-8," & TextDecode ( FAT Media::Media container ; "utf-8" ) ; "")

LayoutObject.name: Interactive container

Calculation.Text: FAT Media::Container file extension = "svg" Or SubtitleMedia ( FAT Media::Container file extension ) Or FAT Media::Container file extension = "json"
FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MP3" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MP4" And FAT Media::Container file extension ≠ "MPG"

StyledText.Data: Created by: <<CreatedBy>>. • <<CreationTimestamp>> |. Last modified by: <<ModifiedBy>> • <<Container modified>>
